title: rubus tenuior
intro: Rubus tenuior, also known as the Dwarf Bramble or Small-flowered Bramble, is a type of flowering shrub in the rose family. This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rubus tenuior include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used fresh in salads and other culinary dishes.
